steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that some hoards were discovered before 2000 and asks for an example. The blank needs a choice that names one or more specific hoards with discovery dates earlier than 2000.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — the Ardagh Hoard was discovered in 1868, and the Balline Hoard was discovered in 1940.: Both dates (1868 and 1940) fall before 2000, directly matching the table data and completing the example. ✓
  • Choice B — the Ardagh Hoard was one of several hoards discovered in the 1800s.: This is vague and does not use specific years from the table; the passage asks for an example supported by data. ✗
  • Choice C — the Balline Hoard and the Carrick-on-Suir Hoard were both discovered in the 2000s.: Dates in the 2000s contradict the “before 2000” signal in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — the Carrick-on-Suir Hoard was discovered in 1940, and the Balline Hoard was discovered in 2013.: 2013 is after 2000, and the attribution of 1940 to Carrick-on-Suir is inconsistent with the table data for Balline. ✗
A is correct.
